name: o3-code
description: Repo-local reconstruction of the macOS Codex App.

scripts.format: prettier --write AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CONTEXT.md README.md docs/**/*.md package.json packages/**/package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml scripts/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.js .prettierrc.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CONTEXT.md README.md docs/**/*.md package.json packages/**/package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml scripts/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.mjs packages/**/*.js .prettierrc.json
